ranked_movies.title: Dumb and Dumber
ranked_movies.reason: Extensively discussed and highly praised for its perfect blend of slapstick and smart writing, with iconic performances by Jim Carrey and Jeff Daniels. It was described as a '10/10' comedy that holds up exceptionally well.

ranked_movies.title: Spy
ranked_movies.reason: Highly recommended as an underrated action-comedy, with specific praise for Jason Statham's comedic performance and Rose Byrne's role. Multiple comments highlight its brilliant jokes and rewatchability.

ranked_movies.title: The Nice Guys
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a hidden gem that viewers discovered on streaming and found hilarious. It was brought up in the context of great, under-discussed comedies.

ranked_movies.title: Hot Rod
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended multiple times as a hilariously stupid comedy perfect for lifting spirits after a heartbreak. Cited for its absurdity and quotable lines.

ranked_movies.title: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently suggested as the ultimate soul-crushing breakup movie that understands heartbreak on a personal level. Described as the greatest breakup movie of all time.

ranked_movies.title: Forgetting Sarah Marshall
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a two-in-one movie that handles breakups with both heartbreak and humor. Specific scenes were quoted and praised for their cathartic value.

ranked_movies.title: Airplane!
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested as a classic laugh-out-loud comedy that is timelessly funny. Mentioned alongside other top comedies for its pure silly chaos.

ranked_movies.title: What We Do in the Shadows
ranked_movies.reason: Praised as one of the funniest movies ever, with personal anecdotes about it creating bonding experiences. Recommended for its hilarious take on vampire lore.

ranked_movies.title: Step Brothers
ranked_movies.reason: Recommended as a guaranteed spirit-lifter that works every time. Specific quotes like the 'Catalina Wine Mixer' were highlighted.

ranked_movies.title: The Secret Life of Walter Mitty
ranked_movies.reason: Suggested as an uplifting movie with beautiful scenery and amazing music, perfect for countering doom and gloom.

ranked_movies.title: Anchorman
ranked_movies.reason: Listed among personal favorite comedies of all time, alongside Superbad. It's a frequently cited classic in the genre.

ranked_movies.title: Superbad
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a top favorite comedy, often paired with Anchorman. It's a benchmark for modern comedies.

ranked_movies.title: Blazing Saddles
ranked_movies.reason: Cited as a favorite all-time comedy, known for its groundbreaking and outrageous humor.

ranked_movies.title: Monty Python and the Holy Grail
ranked_movies.reason: Frequently listed as a top comedy, praised for its absurdity and timeless jokes.

ranked_movies.title: The Big Lebowski
ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a favorite comedy, celebrated for its unique characters and quotable dialogue.

ranked_movies.title: Shaun of the Dead
ranked_movies.reason: Praised as a comedy that can be watched repeatedly without losing its charm. A perfect blend of horror and comedy.

ranked_movies.title: Tropic Thunder
ranked_movies.reason: Listed as a personal favorite for its outrageous humor and satirical take on Hollywood.

ranked_movies.title: Ghostbusters
ranked_movies.reason: Described as the undisputed favorite comedy for many, with no close second.

ranked_movies.reason: Mentioned as a top-tier comedy, known for its brilliant writing and performances.
